basicDetails.schemeName: Incentives by MSME Department for Setting Up of Aromatic Industries in Aroma Park located at SIIDCUL, Kashipur - Centre for Aromatic Plants
basicDetails.implementingAgency: Centre For Aromatic Plants, Selaqui, Dehradun

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Incentives by MSME Department for Setting Up of Aromatic Industries in Aroma Park located at SIIDCUL, Kashipur” scheme is implemented by the Centre for Aromatic Plants (CAP), Selaqui, Dehradun, under the Department of Horticulture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to promote the establishment and growth of aromatic industries in Aroma Park, SIIDCUL, Kashipur by providing financial incentives, concessional facilities, and technical support to entrepreneurs, thereby fostering industrial development and economic growth in the region.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Under this scheme, industries to be set up in Aroma Park are provided with investment promotion assistance, interest subsidy, reimbursement of SGST, exemption from stamp duty, exemption from market fees, and supply of electricity at concessional rates, as detailed in the table below: **Sr. No.****Criteria****Incentives for units to be set up**1Investment promotion assistance40% (maximum ₹40 lakh) on the fixed capital investment made in plant and machinery and workshop building of the enterprise2Interest Subsidy10% of the interest payable on term loans taken for construction of workshop building and purchase of plant &amp;amp; machinery for a period of 5 years from the date of commencement of production (maximum ₹8 lakh per year per unit)3Reimbursement of SGST100% of the net SGST liability on sales made to customers within the state (B2C) for a period of 5 years from the date of commencement of production4Exemption from Stamp DutyFull exemption from stamp duty charges payable on registration of sale deed/lease deed for land for establishment of the enterprise5Exemption from Market Fee100% exemption from market fee on raw materials for a period of 5 years from the date of commencement of production6Supply of Electricity at Concessional RatesFor a period of 5 years from the date of commencement of production, electricity will be supplied at concessional rates applicable for irrigation/tubewell (currently ₹1.55 per unit) along with uninterrupted supply
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote the establishment and growth of aromatic industries in Aroma Park, SIIDCUL, Kashipur by providing financial incentives, concessional facilities, and technical support to entrepreneurs, thereby fostering industrial development and economic growth in the region.

children.text: The “Incentives by MSME Department for Setting Up of Aromatic Industries in Aroma Park located at SIIDCUL, Kashipur” scheme is implemented by the Centre for Aromatic Plants (CAP), Selaqui, Dehradun, under the Department of Horticulture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to promote the establishment and growth of aromatic industries in Aroma Park, SIIDCUL, Kashipur by providing financial incentives, concessional facilities, and technical support to entrepreneurs, thereby fostering industrial development and economic growth in the region.

Under this scheme, industries to be set up in Aroma Park are provided with investment promotion assistance, interest subsidy, reimbursement of SGST, exemption from stamp duty, exemption from market fees, and supply of electricity at concessional rates, as detailed in the table below:
Sr. No.
Criteria
Incentives for units to be set up
Investment promotion assistance
40% (maximum ₹40 lakh) on the fixed capital investment made in plant and machinery and workshop building of the enterprise
Interest Subsidy

10% of the interest payable on term loans taken for construction of workshop building and purchase of plant & machinery for a period of 5 years from the date of commencement of production (maximum ₹8 lakh per year per unit)
Reimbursement of SGST
100% of the net SGST liability on sales made to customers within the state (B2C) for a period of 5 years from the date of commencement of production
Exemption from Stamp Duty
Full exemption from stamp duty charges payable on registration of sale deed/lease deed for land for establishment of the enterprise
Exemption from Market Fee
100% exemption from market fee on raw materials for a period of 5 years from the date of commencement of production
Supply of Electricity at Concessional Rates

For a period of 5 years from the date of commencement of production, electricity will be supplied at concessional rates applicable for irrigation/tubewell (currently ₹1.55 per unit) along with uninterrupted supply
For the establishment of aromatic industries in Aroma Park, SIIDCUL invites online applications through advertisements posted on its website:
https://esiidcul.com/eprocure/home
. Applications for vacant plots in Aroma Park are open for a fixed period. Details regarding plot sizes and the Earnest Money Deposit (EMD) are available on the SIIDCUL website.

Applicants can apply online for their preferred plot based on the plot size and submit the required EMD. After considering all applications received for specific plots within the specified period, industrial plots will be allotted, subject to availability, following the procedure outlined by SIIDCUL. Online bidding is conducted, and the highest bidder is awarded the plot. The successful applicant is issued an allotment letter.
More information about vacant plots and advertisements can be obtained from w
ww.siidcul.com
. The Centre for Aromatic Plants (CAP) provides technical assistance to entrepreneurs interested in setting up industries in Aroma Park.

applicationProcess.process_md: - For the establishment of aromatic industries in Aroma Park, SIIDCUL invites online applications through advertisements posted on its website: [https://esiidcul.com/eprocure/home](https://esiidcul.com/eprocure/home). Applications for vacant plots in Aroma Park are open for a fixed period. Details regarding plot sizes and the Earnest Money Deposit (EMD) are available on the SIIDCUL website. - Applicants can apply online for their preferred plot based on the plot size and submit the required EMD. After considering all applications received for specific plots within the specified period, industrial plots will be allotted, subject to availability, following the procedure outlined by SIIDCUL. Online bidding is conducted, and the highest bidder is awarded the plot. The successful applicant is issued an allotment letter. - More information about vacant plots and advertisements can be obtained from w[ww.siidcul.com](https://siidcul.com/). The Centre for Aromatic Plants (CAP) provides technical assistance to entrepreneurs interested in setting up industries in Aroma Park.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. Entrepreneurs/ individuals interested in setting up an aromatic industry in Aroma Park will be eligible under this scheme.

children.text: Entrepreneurs/ individuals interested in setting up an aromatic industry in Aroma Park will be eligible under this scheme.
